mnemonics.title: Epsilon Closure Steps
mnemonics.content: Remember Epsilon Closure as 'Start Self, Keep Moving': Start from the state, include it, then keep following ε-transitions to include all reachable states.

mnemonics.title: ε-NFA Definition
mnemonics.content: Q-Sigma-δ-q0-F: Queen Sarah Delivers Queen One For (记忆 - Q for States, S for Alphabet)

acronyms.usage: Extended NFA that allows epsilon transitions
Set of states reachable via zero or more ε-transitions
Maps state and input to set of possible next states

visualTips.visualization: Draw as curved arrow labeled 'ε' moving from one state to another without any input consumption - like a 'free pass' or 'teleportation' between states
Imagine a 'bubble' or 'cloud' around a state that expands to include all states reachable via ε-transitions - like water spreading through connected pipes
Each DFA state is a 'bag' or 'set' containing multiple ε-NFA states. Draw as larger circles containing smaller state circles inside.

analogies.analogy: Like walking through a door that doesn't require a key - you can move freely without any input, just because the path exists
Like tracing all connections in a social network starting from one person - you keep expanding to find everyone connected indirectly
Like finding all possible destinations from a hub airport - you check all direct flights (ε-transitions) and then check connections from those airports recursively
